title: LAUNDRY AND SHOWER SERVICES - 211info
text: CHANCE LAUNDRY AND SHOWER SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides shower and laundry services. Individuals may do 2 loads of laundry per week. Dryer access is limited to 30 minutes per load. Services are available on a first-come, first-serve basis. 231 Lyon Street SE Albany, OR 97321 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-3pm Email (541) 791-3411 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 791-3411 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: Unrestricted DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: City of Albany TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located in the building that was previously a Pizza King. Services: Laundry Facilities Public Showers/Baths Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - COMMUNITY MEAL SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - ADDICTIONS/DEPENDENCIES SUPPORT GROUPS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CHANCE
